articles.title: Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz: Oil Prices Surge Amid U.S. Naval Blockade
articles.description: Oil prices spiked over 9% following the U.S. announcement of a naval blockade on Iran's coastline, stirring concerns over energy supply via the Strait of Hormuz. The move comes amid heightened tensions between the U.S. and Iran, with potential long-term supply disruptions being a major concern.

articles.title: The Battle for Hormuz: Tensions Escalate Between the U.S. and Iran
articles.description: The United States, led by President Donald Trump, has reinstated a blockade on Iranian shipping through the Strait of Hormuz and plans to charge a fee for safe passage, escalating tensions with Iran. Hostilities have increased, with attacks from both sides threatening a fragile ceasefire and impacting global oil prices.

articles.title: Oil Prices Surge 8% After Trump Reimposes Iran Blockade
articles.description: Oil prices jumped more than 8% on Monday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced the United States would reinstate its blockade on Iran, forcing traders to once again price in the risk of prolonged disruption to energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
